posts.text: Futures Slide, Oil And Gold Jump, But No Panic https://www.zerohedge.com/markets/futures-slide-oil-and-gold-jump-no-panic
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: Donald Trump likes to start military campaigns at weekends. One theory is that he waits until oil markets are closed, to let the dust settle and prevent prices from going haywire. If so, it is unlikely to work this time https://www.economist.com/finance-and-economics/2026/03/01/war-in-iran-could-cause-the-biggest-oil-shock-in-years
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
To everyone calling for World War 3:

This is NOT a futures open that is anywhere near WW3.

In fact, oil prices have already erased nearly half of their opening gap higher and the S&P 500 is down less than 1%.

Gold is up a mere 2% and Bitcoin is now positive on the day.

Don’t panic. The dust will settle.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: I took the time to write the tweet above while waiting for Google Gemini pro to write two separate detailed JDA strategy reports for two separate patents we be developed.  One has a potential NPV of $4.5 bln the other $8-12 bln.   Prototype and testing costs are a joke and technical risk is scored low.  So glad to have EPA approval for $hg $hgraf  I’ve been waiting for this before ramping up the engagement with major global firms to consider JDA’s with us.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
